text: A giraffe eating from a branch above while a girl stands next to the enclosure.
The meal on the plate has slices of banana next to a glass of wine.
A small boy standing in the middle of a living room wearing big white sneakers.
Several jet boats in the air jumping an ocean wave.
A grounded kite that is set on a grass field.
A black cat is sitting on the lid of a toilet in a bathroom.
A woman dressed in white playing a game of tennis.
A young skier holding his skis posing for a picture .
A table with a variety of raw vegetables in preparation for cooking
A man wears an umbrella hat and blows up a balloon.
